title: Common Themes in Prophecies Recorded in the Symbology of Knotted Tassels
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''"Common Themes in Prophecies Recorded in the Symbology of Knotted Tassels"''' was a paper written by Dr. [[Heilan Rotham]] of the [[University of Pangalactic Cultural Studies]].

Inside was this [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] prophecy:
:He will choose the fate of the weak.
:He will win and break his chains.
:He will choose how he will be loved.
:He will strengthen himself through sacrifice.
:He will make a pet.
:He will strengthen himself through pain.
:He will balance between peace and conflict.
:He will know brotherhood.
:He will remake himself.
:He will immortalize his love.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Sacrifice]]''

[[Category:Articles and academic papers]]
